Off Calendar May-06-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-06-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Request For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Ana Chan's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiffs' Request For Production Of Documents, Set One is DENIED.

See word minutes for complete ruling.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
